sglang.title: [Hicache] Generic page get bugfix
sglang.author: ykwd
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
The call to self.mem_pool_host.set_from_flat_data_page must be executed before operation.increment(self.page_size).
If the order is reversed and operation.increment(self.page_size) runs first, other threads might read incorrect data before self.mem_pool_host.set_from_flat_data_page finish

sglang.title: [Fix] DeepSeek EP accuracy issue on B200 GPUs
sglang.author: alhridoy
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Problem
DeepSeek models with expert parallelism (EP) experience accuracy issues on NVIDIA B200 GPUs while working correctly on H200 GPUs. This affects GSM8K benchmark and other accuracy-sensitive workloads.
Affected Configuration:
python3 -m sglang.launch_server --model deepseek-ai/DeepSeek-V3-0324

sglang.title: fix(cache): move ongoing_prefetch pop after validation to prevent leak
sglang.author: xiaguan
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
There is a high priority bug.
It will cause all prefetch operations to leak, as prefetch operations cannot be released, which subsequently causes hicache to malfunction (due to memory not being freed), and prefetch operations cannot proceed because the prefetch limit is constantly being triggered.
@

vllm.title: [Metrics] Deprecate TPOT in favor of ITL
vllm.author: markmc
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
As per #24015, what we currently call as TPOT should instead be called ITL since what we are actually measuring is the time between iterations, and a single iteration can produce multiple tokens.
I'm flagging the TPOT metric as deprecated from 0.11 - even if this gets released on a 0.10.x release, I

vllm.title: Fix weights loading for Apertus
vllm.author: nathanrchn
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
This PR fixes the weight loading mechanism for the Apertus models. The model uses a custom XIELU activation function that needs custom parameters for each layers. These parameters need to be stored alongside the model's weights. So we need to load the buffers too.

vllm.title: [AMD][Kernel][Bugfix] Cast offsets tensor bn to tl.int64 to avoid GPU segfault
vllm.author: rasmith
vllm.bodyExcerpt: The tensor loaded into bn  is multiplied by stride_k_cache_bs in the _fwd_kernel in prefix_prefill.py and produces an integer overflow resulting in negative offsets which result in a GPU segfault. vllm.title: [V1] Wrapper which plumbs request-level logits processors into vLLM batch-level logits processing
vllm.author: afeldman-nm
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
This PR adds support for passing request-level logits processors into the vLLM V1 engine. This is accomplished using a wrapper which builds a batch-level logits processor class out of a Callable request-level logits processor that complies with the interface described here https://docs.vllm.

vllm.title: [distributed][rl] remove nccl cumem env var override
vllm.author: youkaichao
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
The env var override was initially designed to mitigate NCCL's memory overhead occuring in NCCL 2.19. Reports from NCCL team show that this env var needs to be enabled by default to enable many optimizations. And I have confirmed in NVIDIA/nccl#1234 that NCCL 2.22.3 resolved the memory overh
